resolutions.content: Pronunciation TF requests that APA Call for Consensus to publish our Gap Analysis as a First Public Working Draft, with the understanding that we will complete all content currently present which doesn't completely express our concept.

Pronunciation TF requests that APA Call for Consensus to publish our User Scenarios as a First Public Working Draft, with the understanding that we will complete all content currently present which doesn't completely express our concept.
